user_driver: ich spreche von einem Loop der nie endet und das System immer immer weiter optimiert.
summary: Never-ending, compounding self-optimization loop for drift itself. Six-phase cycle (OBSERVE → DIAGNOSE → PROPOSE → EMIT → TRACK → WAIT). Strictly POLICY-compliant: no auto-merge, no PR comments, no push.
diagnostics: regressive KPI slope (aggregate_f1, mutation_recall, precision_recall_mean) below -0.005
hotspot findings ranked by severity_weight × score (per-signal cap = max_items // 3)
stale audit (signal source newer than audit_results/*.md by >= 14 days)

compounding.recurrence_signal: previously seen proposal_id => recurrence=2 => sorts ahead of new

coverage: CLI ledger subcommand handles missing ledger

audit_updates: audit_results/fmea_matrix.md (4 new rows: loop runaway, metric gaming, ledger corruption, push without consent)
audit_results/risk_register.md (RISK-ADR-097-DSOL entry with severity, triggers, mitigations)

policy_alignment.no_unsolicited_posting: workflow uploads artefact + writes job summary only — never opens issues or PR comments

out_of_scope_explicit: modifying signal scoring weights based on DSOL output
